notes:
First public release of NobuCleaner.

- Deep Uninstaller with residue scan
- System Cleaner (9 categories)
- Registry Cleaner with auto-backup
- Startup & Services Manager
- Browser Cleaner
- Privacy & Telemetry controls
- Disk Analyzer + Duplicate Finder
- Hardware Monitor with S.M.A.R.T.
- Automatic scheduled maintenance
- 31 languages
